_comment: The 2D world hub = the home screen. You drop in at the LEFT; the `intro` text shows while you can wander only the left bit (an invisible wall at intro.barrierX, pillars still off-screen). SPACE / tap dismisses the intro — the wall lifts and a 'WALK RIGHT' arrow points you to the four pillar-doors, clustered close together so all four are visible at once. Gate 1 -> level-grid; Gates 2-4 locked. Data-driven `gate` actors + `hub: true` + `intro`.

lines: The grid's running dirty — we need to flip it GREEN.
Collect clean energy, dodge the fossil fuels.
Four pillars stand between us and net zero.
Walk right and choose where to begin.
